title: Ay's Overworld Quartz
description: A simple mod that adds quartz ore to the overworld!
body:
![Ay's Overworld Quartz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faffe5d702cdef1472a1dd1c1f509d7a2634d996_0.webp)

---

![Stone, Diorite, Andesite Quartz Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef02906e6501354f0080338cef4d923d52074398.jpeg)
![Granite, Deepslate, Tuff Quartz Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d38ede10473a2500d32398278828159cbac2564.jpeg)

Ay's Overworld Quartz adds quartz ore to the overworld. The quartz ore spawn in 6 different stone variations. 

Quartz ore spawns less frequently than in the Nether and in smaller batches. 



Hope you have fun and as always if you have any ideas for the mod, leave them in the comments and I'll try to add them to the mod!

If you find any issues with the mod, please leave them in the comments and I'll try to fix them as soon as possible!

You can use the mod in any of your modpacks! 

Also check us out on CurseForge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ays-overworld-quartz
